parsed_review.summary: CP00-651 (RP21 Admin Console UI permission & synthetic fixture descriptor, Risk B, 40 units, RP21.P04.M04.S18-RP21.P04.M06.S15) passes hardened read-only review. The pack-level claim is descriptor-only verification with no-write/no-real-data preservation; it correctly reports production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress, and does NOT claim product runtime or enterprise trust. Verification: (1) registry binding (registry.js:103) matches manifest, baseline, and generated contract exactly — risk B, 40 units, upstream CP00-650, next CP00-652/RP21.P04.M06.S16, runtime_opened=false; (2) deliverable distribution (hermes 2/claude 4/impl 11/ui 17/security 4/fixture 1/test 1=40) and micro-title distribution (Secondary Workflow Slice 3/Permission And Audit Binding 22/Synthetic Fixture Set 15) match the prompt baseline and are enforced by validateAdminConsoleCp651Coverage; (3) descriptor-only boundaries enforced — every case-set row descriptor_only=true/runtime_execution=false/raw_payload_included=false, freezeCp651Result pins ~40 runtime/mutation/leak flags false, runtime_boundary and no_write_attestation fully closed; (4) permission/audit slice does not evaluate runtime permission, write permission decisions, or emit/persist audit events, and asserts no_unauthorized_count_leak=true with deny-over-allow and the five required no-leak guards; (5) fixtures synthetic-only (fixture_payload_included=false, real_client_data_loaded=false) — no real tenant/matter/document/billing data; (6) Claude remains read-only independent reviewer (claude_review_plan.read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, blocks_pack_on_p0_p1_p2=true) and is not final approver; (7) Hermes patterns used only for deterministic descriptor evidence packet/receipt (hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false) — not product runtime; (8) review-hardening infrastructure healthy: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1455-byte valid JSON stdout, not 0-byte/malformed/tool-call-shaped), prompt 2515<25600 bytes, no forbidden tools, summary-only correctly prohibited (Risk B + security/review deliverables), source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used; (9) command-evidence records all 23 commands (incl. every prompt-required validation command, npm test, build, git diff --check) exit 0; (10) tests cover CP651 (4 model.test.js cases + validator deep-equality assertions). The current pending placeholders in claude-review-result/adjudication/construction-inspection are the expected pre-receipt state awaiting this review. blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack asserts no runtime/enterprise-trust claim and the human/enterprise-trust authority boundary is closed outside this receipt. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
